overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player exploring a misty forest environment. The character walks down a grassy hillside, wades across a shallow rocky river, and continues along the vegetated far bank. The scene features atmospheric fog, dense greenery, and realistic water rendering with a muted green-gray color palette.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily downhill through tall grass and scattered trees toward a misty river

entered.detail: leafless tree trunk standing prominently in foreground
sloping terrain covered in tall green grass and wildflowers
misty river visible through trees in the valley below
tall evergreen trees lining the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty forest hillside with a tall dead tree in the foreground. The camera moves forward through dense grass and scattered vegetation, descending toward a river visible in the distance through the atmospheric fog. The environment is quiet and natural, with no other characters or man-made structures present.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with rocky bed

events.description: character steps from grassy bank into shallow river water
camera tilts down to look at riverbed pebbles while wading

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water, moving past a large rock formation in the stream

entered.detail: massive boulder sitting in the middle of the river current
clear shallow water with visible current and ripples
rocky river bottom visible through clear water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow river, wading through clear water toward a large rock formation. The camera moves steadily through the current, briefly looking down at the pebble riverbed before continuing toward the far bank. The misty atmosphere persists over the water surface.

events.description: character exits river onto muddy grassy bank
game UI prompt appears indicating collectible item nearby

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank through grass and bushes, with the river now on the right side

notable_agents.action: bird flying across the sky above the river

entered.detail: muddy slope covered in grass and small plants leading up from water
decaying tree trunk lying on the bank
thick tree line along the top of the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character exits the water onto the far riverbank, walking along a grassy path with the river now on the right. A fallen log lies on the left side of the path, and a bird flies overhead. The game interface displays a pick-up prompt, indicating an interactive element in the environment. The camera continues along the bank through dense vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty forest hillside down through a shallow river and onto a vegetated far bank. It begins by descending through dense grass and scattered vegetation, passing a tall dead tree while moving toward a river obscured by atmospheric fog. As the camera reaches the water, it wades steadily through the clear current and over a pebble riverbed toward a large rock formation. The scene then shifts as the character exits the water onto a grassy path, passing a fallen log while a bird flies overhead. Finally, the camera continues along the riverbank through thick greenery, with the water remaining to the right as the journey progresses.
